title: Robin’s Warning
description: Franky is forced into the center of the conflict as CP9 targets both him and Iceburg for the ancient weapon blueprints.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Iceburg, Nico Robin, Franky, Chopper, Rob Lucci. Franky is forced into the center of the conflict as CP9 targets both him and Iceburg for the ancient weapon blueprints.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Good job!! Now, get mine off!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Don't worry, we did our jobs properly.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I UNDER- Stand your discourage- Ment.....

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: The 9th Cipher Pol that shouldn't exist.

summary: Franky is forced into the center of the conflict as CP9 targets both him and Iceburg for the ancient weapon blueprints.
